JUDGE MASON, M.NORMAN,CSR, K.LEE,CLERK 03:06 C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. RICHARD ALEXANDER FOR THE PLTF. DEFTS KNIGHT AND LARSON PRESENT AND PRO PER. DEFT JUSTIN LUHRS NOT PRESENT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNIGHT, JOY LARSON, RUTH LUHRS, JUSTIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1419 GOLDEN GATE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL MAR-30-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICT STAYED TO 5PM 3/30/95 ONLY IF DFTS MAKE $500 PAYMNT TO PLTFF ON/BEFORE 2/28/95. PLTF WAIVES FURTHER CLAIMS FOR UNPAID RENTS, ATNYS FEES & COSTS. IF $500 PMNT NOT MADE, PLTF MAY MOVE FOR IMMEDIATE EVICTION UPON WRITTEN DECLARATN.
